title: LaSalle College Vancouver - Canada.ca
content:
## LaSalle College Vancouver
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Design in Graphic Design
- Bachelor of Applied Design in Interior Design
- Bachelor of Science in Game Programming
- Bachelor of Design in Fashion Design
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
